texto: One binds the worldly life with bad thoughts
autor: one binds the worldly life with good thoughts. With the absence of thoughts (avichaar) there is moksha [liberation].
explicacao: Citação de one binds the worldly life with good thoughts. With the absence of thoughts (avichaar) there is moksha [liberation]. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “One binds the worldly life with bad thoughts” articula reflexao, dada-bhagwan, binds em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
